description.short: Collection O Darussalam Near Universitas Syiah Kuala puts two travelers within easy reach of Banda Aceh’s cultural highlights—museums, mosques and tsunami memorials—plus lively markets and seafood-lined waterfronts. Practical amenities include 24-hour front desk service, secure on-site parking, express check-in and luggage storage for a smooth arrival and departure. Rooms feature cool air conditioning, complimentary Wi-Fi for work or streaming, refreshing showers and plush towels; select rooms offer sparkling city views. A convenient, well-located option for exploring Aceh. [Some content may be Generative AI assisted. Inaccuracies may occur.]

comments.reviewComments: This is a continuation of my previous 4-night room booking. I had a very good experience staying here. The staff is friendly, and the room is comparable to the price. What I liked most is that the staff cares about the security of my personal vehicle. Also, the spring bed is really of good quality. I can hardly believe it, and what is very pleasant is that the air conditioning is cool! That's what I needed in this hot weather in Banda Aceh. I am very satisfied and will definitely return later!

comments.responseText:
Dear Guest,

Terima kasih atas ulasan luar biasa dan rating 10 yang Anda berikan untuk Collection O Darussalam Near Universitas Syiah Kuala Formerly Meurah Mulia. Kami sangat senang mengetahui Anda mendapatkan pengalaman menginap yang nyaman selama 5 malam bersama kami.

Apresiasi Anda terhadap keramahan staf, perhatian terhadap keamanan kendaraan, kenyamanan spring bed, serta AC yang dingin sangat berarti bagi kami. Kami juga senang mengetahui fasilitas dan pelayanan kami dapat memenuhi kebutuhan Anda selama berada di Banda Aceh.

Terima kasih pula atas saran dan masukan yang sangat membangun terkait petunjuk kiblat, sajadah, dan kondisi shower kamar. Feedback Anda telah kami teruskan kepada tim terkait untuk menjadi perhatian dan bahan evaluasi demi meningkatkan kualitas fasilitas dan layanan kami ke depannya.

Kami sangat menantikan kedatangan Anda kembali di kunjungan berikutnya.

Hormat kami,
Liya
Collection O Darussalam Near Universitas Syiah Kuala Formerly Meurah Mulia
comments.reviewComments: I am someone who often stays in hotels and honestly, I have a taste for every hotel I have ever stayed in. For a one-star hotel, there shouldn't be much to review or complain about. However, during my 5-night stay here, I had a very good experience. The staff is friendly, the room is in line with the price... what I liked the most is that the staff cares about the security of my vehicle, and the spring bed is really good quality.. I could hardly believe it, and what is really pleasant is that the air conditioning is cold! That’s what I need in the hot weather of Banda Aceh. Moving forward, I hope this hotel can maintain and improve its quality in terms of facilities and the already very good staff service. A small suggestion, if I may... If possible, there could be a Qibla direction sign and a prayer mat in the room. Oh, and the shower could perhaps be replaced, because the shower in my room barely worked, so I had to bathe, perform ablution, and urinate using the same water in a bucket. But that wasn't really a problem. That's all... Thank you, I will definitely come back.
comments.originalComment: Saya adalah salah satu orang yang sering menginap di hotel dan jujur saya punya selera untuk setiap hotel yang pernah saya tempati. Untuk hotel bintang satu, seharusnya tidak banyak yang harus di ulas ataupun di komplain. Namun selama 5 malam saya menginap disini saya merasakan pengalaman yang sangat baik. Staff ramah, kamar sebanding dengan harga.. yang paling saya suka adalah staff nya perduli dengan keamanan kendara milik saya, kemudian untuk springbed nya benar benar kualitas bagus.. saya hampir tidak percaya hal itu, dan yang sangat menyenangkan nya adalah AC nya dingin! Itu yang saya butuhkan di cuaca Banda Aceh yang sedang panas ini. Kedepannya saya berharap hotel ini dapat menjaga sekaligus meningkatkan kualitas nya baik dari segi fasilitas ataupun pelayanan staff nya yang sudah sangat baik. Saran dan masukan sedikit kalau boleh... Kalau bisa ada petunjuk kiblat dan sejadah didalam kamar. Ohya, showernya mungkin sudah bisa diganti, karena shower di kamar saya tempati Itu nyaris tidak berfungsi, sehingga saya harus mandi, Wudu' dan BAK menggunakan air yang sama didalam ember. namun itu tidak jadi masalah sebenarnya. Itu saja... Terimakasih, saya pasti akan kembali.
